stimulus: In her 1972 exhibition Magnet TV, Korean American artist Nam June Paik showed how television signals could be reshaped through electromagnetic interference. Today, Paik ______blank widely regarded as a pioneer of video art.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The present tense “is,” together with the time marker “today,” correctly indicates that Paik is currently regarded as a pioneer of video art.

Choice A (past perfect) doesn’t match “today.” Choice C (future) inappropriately places a current view in the future. Choice D (simple past) suggests the regard is no longer present.
